body: Dr. Meera, JIDA ka Oct issue aaya. Ek important finding — 2,100 patient trial mein 3-month fluoride recall ne 6-month se 38% better caries recurrence reduce ki (high-risk adults mein). Aapke 124 high-risk adult patients ke liye relevant hai. Abstract chahiye + ready-to-share patient WhatsApp? Reply YES. — JIDA Oct 2026, p.14
rationale: Research digest trigger; anchored on JIDA trial specifics (2,100 patients, 38%, p.14) and merchant's own 124-patient high-risk cohort. Loss aversion + effort externalization ('ready-to-share patient WhatsApp') as compulsion levers.

body: Dr. Meera, DCI ne radiograph dose limit revise ki hai — effective 15 Dec 2026. Max dose per IOPA: 1.5 mSv → 1.0 mSv. D-speed film fail karega; E-speed aur digital RVG pass. Abhi X-ray setup audit karna zaroori hai. Kya main aapke liye compliance checklist draft karoon? — DCI Circular 2026-11-04
rationale: High-urgency (4) compliance trigger with hard deadline. Anchored on exact numbers (1.5→1.0 mSv), specific film types, and deadline date. Loss aversion ('D-speed fail karega') + effort externalization ('main checklist draft karoon').

body: Hi Priya 🦷 Dr. Meera's clinic se. Aapka 6-month cleaning recall due hai — last cleaning May 2026 mein thi. Aapke liye 2 evening slots ready hain: Wed 5 Nov, 6pm ya Thu 6 Nov, 5pm. Dental Cleaning @ ₹299 + complimentary fluoride. Reply 1 for Wed, 2 for Thu. 😊
rationale: Customer-facing recall message. Honored language pref (hi-en mix), weekday evening slot preference, specific dates and catalog price. Effort externalization ('slots ready') + binary-style slot choice for frictionless booking.

body: Dr. Bharat, this week aapke clinic calls 50% drop huye hain — 12 se 6 reh gaye. Peer average 12 calls/month hai aur aap already neeche the. Common cause: GBP profile incomplete ya stale posts. Main abhi audit karoon aur reason pinpoint karoon? Reply YES. — 7-day performance alert
rationale: Urgency-4 perf dip. Anchored on exact numbers (12→6 calls, 50%), peer benchmark, and a specific root cause hypothesis. Loss aversion + effort externalization ('main audit karoon').

body: Dr. Bharat, Pro plan 12 din mein expire ho raha hai (₹4,999). Is month aapka profile 6 calls mila — renewal lapse hone se visibility drop hogi aur yeh aur kum ho sakti hai. Main renewal link bhej doon? Reply YES. — Account alert
rationale: Urgency-4 renewal with loss aversion framing (lapse = visibility drop on top of existing dip). Specific numbers: 12 days, ₹4,999, 6 calls. Effort externalization: 'main link bhej doon'.

body: Lakshmi ji, Diwali 31 Oct ko hai — 188 din baad. Hyderabad mein salons ke liye yeh biggest booking season hai. Last year studios ne Diwali festive offer 6 weeks pehle run kiya — appointments 2.3x badi thi. Kya main aapke liye ek Diwali Glow Package (Haircut + Facial + Manicure combo) draft karoon? Reply YES.
rationale: Festival trigger with enough lead time to act. Social proof ('studios ne 2.3x bookings') + loss aversion (start now before season peaks) + effort externalization ('combo draft karoon'). Specific festival date included.

body: Hi Kavya! Studio11 here 💍 Your bridal trial was March 22 — wedding's on Nov 8, which is 196 days away. The 30-day pre-bridal skin prep program works best if started by Oct 9. Want me to block those dates for you? Reply YES and I'll send you the program details.
rationale: Customer-facing bridal followup with specific dates (trial: Mar 22, wedding: Nov 8, program start: Oct 9). Urgency via deadline, effort externalization ('block dates for you'). English-only per language pref.

body: Lakshmi ji, quick question — is week aapke salon mein sabse zyada kaunsi service ke liye log pooch rahe hain? (Balayage, summer hair spa, ya kuch aur?) Yeh jaanke main aapke GBP pe sahi offer highlight kar sakti hoon. 30 second ka jawab, double impact. 😊
rationale: Curiosity/asking-the-merchant lever. No hard sell, just drawing the merchant into the conversation with a low-effort question that unlocks the next useful action (GBP offer update). Reciprocity framing ('I can then help you').

body: Anjali ji, aapka subscription 38 din pehle expire hua. Tab se 24 naye customers aapke locality mein salons se connected hue hain — without your profile being visible. Rejoining abhi maan lo toh unhe target kar sakte hain before competition closes in. Kya plan discuss karoon? Reply YES.
rationale: Winback trigger using loss aversion ('24 customers acquired by competition while you were offline'). Specific numbers: 38 days, 24 customers. Social proof implicit in 'competition closing in'.

body: Suresh ji, DC vs MI tonight at Arun Jaitley Stadium — match 7:30pm se. Delhi mein restaurants jo IPL Match Day offer run karte hain unhe 60-80% more delivery orders milte hain us evening. Kya main aapke liye 'Match Day Combo' (Pizza + Drink @ ₹299) ka ek GBP post draft karoon — abhi publish ho jaye before 4pm? Reply YES.
rationale: Urgency-3 time-sensitive trigger with local match. Social proof (60-80% more orders), loss aversion (window closing at 4pm), effort externalization, specific combo price from catalog. Hindi-English mix.

body: Suresh ji, last 30 din mein 4 reviews mein 'late delivery' mention hua hai — most common quote: 'took 50 mins for a 15 min ride'. Yeh trend badh raha hai. Agar unaddressed raha, 1-star reviews se CTR aur orders dono drop hote hain. Kya main aapke liye ek public response template draft karoon + delivery window ko GBP pe update karoon? Reply YES.
rationale: Review theme trigger with real quote and count (4 reviews, 50-min quote). Loss aversion (CTR drop if unaddressed). Effort externalization: response template + GBP update bundled into one YES.

body: Suresh ji, congratulations 🎉 — aapne 100 Google reviews cross kar liye! Bangalore restaurants ka peer average 58 reviews hai, aap already 72% aage hain. Yeh moment GBP par showcase karne ka best time hai. Kya main 'Crossed 100 Reviews' Google Post + ek 'Thank you regulars' WhatsApp campaign draft karoon? Reply YES.
rationale: Milestone trigger. Social proof (72% above peer avg of 58). Effort externalization: bundled GBP post + customer campaign into one action. Reciprocity lever (celebrating the merchant's achievement).

body: Suresh ji, aapne corporate thali planning mention kiya tha. Koramangala mein 3 restaurants ne last quarter corporate lunch tie-ups se 18-22% revenue add kiya. Typical deal: 40-60 covers/day @ ₹180-220/thali with monthly advance. Main aapke liye ek 'Corporate Thali' offer + GBP post draft karoon? Reply YES.
rationale: Active intent trigger. Social proof (3 Koramangala peers, 18-22% revenue lift). Specificity: cover range, price range. Effort externalization: offer + post bundled.

body: Karthik ji, April-May typically gyms ka slowest acquisition period hota hai — post-New Year resolution drop. Bangalore ke gyms jo is window mein '30-day challenge' campaigns run karte hain woh 25-40% better retention dikhate hain vs those who go quiet. Kya main aapke liye ek 'May Power Challenge' campaign (WhatsApp + GBP) draft karoon? Reply YES.
rationale: Seasonal dip trigger with social proof (25-40% better retention). Frames inaction as loss. Effort externalization: full campaign draft.

body: Karthik ji, Rashmi (was coming 3x/week till Jan) hasn't been in for 4 months — she's lapsed hard. One proven re-engagement: a personal 'we miss you' text with a 1-month trial at reduced rate works for 1 in 3 lapsed members in this tier. Want me to draft that message for her? Reply YES.
rationale: Customer lapsed-hard trigger. Social proof (1 in 3 conversion rate). Loss aversion (retention window). Effort externalization: draft ready to send. Reciprocity: Vera noticed and acted.

body: Padma ji, aapka kids yoga program idea excellent timing hai — school summer break June-July mein starts hogi. Chennai gyms jo kids batch run karte hain 30-45% better family retention dikhate hain (parents stay when kids are enrolled). Kya main program structure + pricing + GBP post draft karoon? 3 decisions: batch size, age range, price. Reply YES.
rationale: Active intent trigger. Social proof (30-45% family retention stat). Seasonal hook (summer break). Effort externalization: full structure drafted, only 3 decisions from merchant.

body: Hi Karthik! ZenYoga here 🧘 How was your trial session? We have 2 morning slots open this week — Mon 6am and Wed 7am. First month membership at ₹1,299 (regular ₹1,799). Interested? Reply YES for the slot, or tell us a time that works better.
rationale: Customer-facing trial followup. Specific slots, specific price with anchor (₹1,299 vs ₹1,799 regular). English per language pref. Low-friction: reply YES or suggest time.

body: Ramesh ji, atorvastatin 10mg batch alert — Pharma Alert 2026-04-23 se. Affected lot: AT-2025-JL-009 to AT-2025-JL-022. If you have these in stock, hold from dispensing till cleared. Main aapke liye a customer communication draft karoon jinhe yeh medicine mil sakti thi? Reply YES.
rationale: High-urgency supply alert with specific lot numbers and source citation. Action-oriented: hold stock + customer communication. Effort externalization for affected patient outreach.

body: Namaste! Apollo Pharmacy Jaipur se. Aapki metformin + amlodipine refill due hai is week. Home delivery available — order aaj karein aur kal subah 10 baje tak mil jayegi. Reply 1 for home delivery, 2 for store pickup.
rationale: Customer-facing chronic refill. Specific medicines, specific delivery window. Hindi per language pref. Practical two-choice CTA (delivery vs pickup).

body: Ramesh ji, Jaipur mein April-May mein ORS, antihistamines, aur sunscreen demand 3x badh jaati hai. Last year pharmacy jo ek 'Summer Health Kit' bundle run kiya tha unhe 22% walk-in boost mila. Kya main aapke liye Summer Kit offer + GBP post draft karoon? Reply YES.
rationale: Category seasonal trigger. Specific demand spike (3x), social proof (22% walk-in boost from peers), local context (Jaipur summer). Effort externalization: offer + post.

body: Vikas ji, aapka Google Business Profile abhi unverified hai. Iska matlab: aapka pharmacy map pe show nahi hota 'open now' filter mein, aur competitors bypass kar rahe hain. Verification free hai — 5 min ka process. Kya main aapko step-by-step guide karoon? Reply YES.
rationale: GBP unverified trigger with loss aversion ('not showing in open now filter'). Effort externalization + low-barrier framing ('5 min, free').

body: Dr. Meera, IDA Delhi ka webinar hai 2 May (7pm) — Digital Impressions: Primescan 2, Trios 5, CAD/CAM ROI for solo practices. 2 CDE credits. IDA members ke liye free, non-members ₹500. Dr. R. Mehta presenting. Worth the 2 hours if crown cases aapke monthly case-mix mein hain. Kya main reminder set karoon? Reply YES.
rationale: CDE trigger with specifics: date, time, speaker, credits, price, topic. Reciprocity (Vera proactively flagged relevant CPD). Curiosity + 'worth it if' framing avoids hard sell.

body: Dr. Meera, ek naya dental clinic 1.3km door GBP pe just launched hua — Lajpat Nagar II mein. Aapka CTR already peer median (0.030) se below hai (0.021). Yeh best time hai profile strengthen karne ka before they settle in. 2 quick wins: stale posts update + aligner consultation offer live karna. Kya main dono kaam karoon? Reply YES.
rationale: Competitor opened trigger with loss aversion (CTR already below peer). Specific numbers (1.3km, 0.021 vs 0.030 CTR). Two bundled actions to create urgency without overwhelming.

body: Padma ji, good news! Yesterday aapke profile views 28% spike kiye — above your average. Yeh window hai capitalize karne ki before traffic normalizes. Ek 'Free Trial Class' offer abhi live ho toh yeh visitors convert ho sakte hain. Kya main offer + GBP post draft karoon — 10 min mein live? Reply YES.
rationale: Perf spike trigger with specific number (+28%). Creates urgency ('window' before traffic normalizes). Effort externalization ('10 min mein live'). Positive framing to build momentum.

body: Anjali ji, 14 din ho gaye — sab theek hai? Last time aapne salon availability ke baare mein pooch raha tha. Mere paas aapke liye ek quick win ready hai: aapke 3 top services Haircut @ ₹499, Facial @ ₹799 aur Hair Spa ka GBP post — already drafted, sirf aapka GO chahiye. Reply YES.
rationale: Dormancy trigger with reciprocity ('already drafted it for you') and curiosity (showing work done). References last conversation context. Low-friction: single YES to publish 3 service posts.

body: Dr. Meera, 'clear aligners Delhi' searches +62% YoY (28-45 age band, Practo + Google Trends). DIY aligner brands bhi market mein aa rahe hain — supervised vs DIY messaging aapko differentiate karta hai. Aapka current aligner offer @ ₹499 consultation iska natural hook hai. Kya main GBP description + ek WhatsApp post draft karoon positioning supervised care? Reply YES.
rationale: Category trend trigger with specific YoY data (+62%), source (Practo+Google), age segment. Loss aversion (DIY competition). Merchant's existing offer (₹499 consultation) makes action frictionless.

body: Lakshmi ji, aapka last GBP post 28 din puraana ho gaya. Salons jo weekly post karte hain unhe 18% better search visibility milti hai. Summer mein hair care posts trend kar rahe hain Hyderabad mein (damage repair, oil treatments). Kya main 3 summer-themed posts draft karoon — ek abhi publish, 2 scheduled? Reply YES.
rationale: Stale posts trigger with specific stat (18% better visibility), local context (Hyderabad summer trends), and bundled output (3 posts, 1 immediate + 2 scheduled). Social proof + effort externalization.

body: Suresh ji, aapka CTR 1.8% hai — peer average 3.2% hai (44% gap). Yeh matlab hai: same views aa rahe hain, but fewer people click for directions ya call. Most common fix: cover photo + description update. Kya main dono update karoon? 10 min ka kaam, potentially double the click-throughs. Reply YES.
rationale: CTR below peer with specific numbers (1.8% vs 3.2%, 44% gap). Loss aversion (same traffic, fewer converts). Simple root-cause hypothesis + specific fix. Effort externalization ('10 min ka kaam').

body: Karthik ji, 6am weekday batch mein sirf 3 slots bacha hain (20 mein se 17 full)! Yeh best social proof hai naye members ke liye. Kya main ek 'Last 3 Slots' GBP post + WhatsApp blast draft karoon for your existing contacts? Reply YES — agar slots fill ho gaye toh post naturally archive ho jayegi.
rationale: Batch filling trigger with exact scarcity numbers (3/20 slots). Loss aversion + social proof bundled. Smart add: 'post auto-archives when full' reduces merchant's fear of overselling.

body: Ramesh ji, aapke 31% transactions UPI hain — pharmacy peer average 61% hai. Customers jo UPI accept karte hain unhe 15-20% more repeat visits milti hain (convenience factor). Aapke store pe UPI already available hai, but GBP pe 'UPI Accepted' badge missing hai. Main 2 min mein add karoon? Reply YES.
rationale: Digital payment gap with specific numbers (31% vs 61% peer). Retention stat (15-20% more repeat visits). Low-effort action (GBP badge, 2 min). Loss aversion + effort externalization.
